CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-17-2024 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-06-2024 Continued To Oct-16-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-26-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT BATH AUTHORITY LLC DBA DREAMLINE's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT.

Defendant Bath Authority LLC dba Dreamline's unopposed Motion to Strike Punitive Damages from the Complaint is granted.

Counsel for the defendant is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Rochelle East; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RCE)
